x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Pledgor / Borrower / Customer: The person that provides the collateral to secure obligations and from whom collateral is allocated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: Secured Party / Lender / Bank: The bank or financial institution that receives, holds, and allocates the collateral against specific obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Manager
x-enumeration-literals.description: Collateral Manager / Collateral Agent: The person or organization responsible for allocating, monitoring, and distributing collateral across exposures or obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee collateral allocation practices, ensuring compliance, fairness, and enforceability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Provider
x-enumeration-literals.description: A person or organization that provides collateral on behalf of the borrower.
